product_name: Anime Heroes MEGA - One Piece - Roronoa Zoro 12" Action Figure

bullets: ‌Set sail with Anime Heroes Mega – One Piece, the bold new 12” scale figure line celebrating the epic world of One Piece!
With premium detailing and an anime-accurate sculpt, Roronoa Zoro comes to life in dynamic scale, making a standout addition to any collection
Play with your favorite characters - each 12-inch figure comes with 5 points of articulation and endless fun
Durable, tough, and ready for action inside, or outside, these figures are great to play with and will last a long time in even the roughest conditions

Looks just like the show - Anime Heroes Mega figures have true to character deco and sculpting to make sure each figure come to life in your hands, and look just like your favorite characters in the anime
content.description: Fans of one of the biggest anime's of all time, Naruto, can now bring home their favorite characters from the Anime Heroes 6.5-inch Naruto action figure line, by Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles. Immerse yourself into the world of Naruto and recreate the biggest battles and missions with action figures that look exactly like their anime characters! For ages 4 and up.

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
